proved: the Rust request targets stable POST /v1/interactions and rejects the v1beta path
the API key travels in x-goog-api-key and the request forces store:false, background:false, and stream:false
system and user text plus generation_config.max_output_tokens are mapped without provider SDK state
thinking_summaries is none and thought/non-text output contents are not retained
Interaction identity, status, text, and usage normalize only when total tokens cover input plus output
wrong disclosure, missing user input, provider errors, inconsistent usage, timeout, and cancellation fail with sanitized typed errors
Gemini credentials have a distinct OS-vault account namespace
notProved: Gemini streaming lifecycle event normalization or network dispatch
tools, thought signatures, structured output, multimodal content, or stored interaction state
retry, resumption, request IDs, or live rate-limit handling
product credential integration, frontend disclosure, or UI availability
a live Gemini request or any model-quality property
